data.title: Three individuals were arrested following a home invasion at a Binance France executive's home. Binance confirmed the incident.
data.description: According to a report by RTL, three individuals were arrested by the French police in connection with a burglary aimed at a senior executive of Binance France. The cryptocurrency exchange, Binance, has verified that an employee was subject to a home invasion incident.

data.title: mr.Booster wins Best Marketing Campaign 2026 award at SiGMA Eurasia, recognizing Hooked Back campaign.
data.description: An esteemed marketing agency, mr.Booster, based in Dubai, UAE, achieved a significant milestone on Feb. 13, 2026. The agency clinched the prestigious Best Marketing Campaign 2026 award at SiGMA Eurasia 2026, a crucial event for the digital entertainment sector. This recognition was for their remarkable campaign titled Hooked Back. This win highlights mr.Booster's expertise in creating impactful marketing strategies aimed at driving success across the full customer journey. Such accolades are indicative of their innovative approach in the competitive marketing landscape.

data.title: National Police Association backs COPS Act to combat drug cartels. Drug cartels fuel opioid crisis.
data.description: In Indianapolis on February 13, 2026, it was reported that the opioid epidemic, driven by drug cartels and transnational criminal organizations (TCOs), has caused significant harm to numerous individuals and poses an ongoing threat to the country. These groups are responsible for perpetuating crimes linked to the opioid crisis, such as trafficking and financial exploitation. The precise number of lives affected by this epidemic and the extent of the damage caused by these criminal networks remain immense.

data.title: US inflation drops to 2.4% in January, below expectations of 2.5%. Monthly CPI rose 0.2%, lowest rate since May 2025.
data.description: In the U.S., price pressures have diminished as the annual consumer-price inflation rate decreased from 2.7% in December to 2.4% in January 2026. This rate was lower than the anticipated 2.5%, making it the lowest inflation recorded since May 2025. On a monthly basis, the headline Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by 0.2%, slightly lower than the previous month and market expectations.

data.title: AAPL releases book on dual-physician marriages, featuring 35 couples' stories. Aimed to explore strategies for success.
data.description: The American Association for Physician Leadership (AAPL) has released a new book titled Lessons Learned: Stories from Dual-Physician Marriages, which delves into the experiences of 35 couples in dual-physician marriages. This groundbreaking publication provides insights into the challenges and successes faced by these couples in balancing their personal and professional lives. With authentic stories as the focal point, this book sheds light on the intricacies of maintaining a harmonious relationship while both partners pursue careers in medicine.

data.title: Bondholders of Aktieselskabet Schouw & Co. passed a Written Resolution on 13 Feb 2026 regarding FRN senior bonds maturing in 2029.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Aktieselskabet Schouw & Co. issued a reference to their previous announcement on February 6, 2026, regarding the summons for a Written Resolution under the bond terms dated June 14, 2024, for the Issuer's FRN senior unsecured bond issue maturing in 2029 (ISIN NO0013260349). The announcement pertains to the Bonds and the necessary steps to be taken in accordance with the Bond Terms.

data.title: Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 20, 2026, before market opens, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025 will be released on Friday, February 20, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call and webcast discussing the results will also take place on the same day at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Investors and analysts are encouraged to tune in for insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Granite selected for preconstruction services for I-80 East Widening Project in Nevada. $19 million agreement towards $475 million project.
data.description: Granite has been chosen by the Nevada Department of Transportation (NDOT) to provide preconstruction services for the forthcoming Interstate 80 (I-80) East Widening Project in Washoe County. The project will cover a 13-mile stretch from Vista Boulevard to USA Parkway and is estimated to cost around $475 million. The contract for preconstruction services amounts to approximately $19 million. This selection signifies a significant step towards the initiation of the construction phase for the project.

data.title: Lunai Bioworks (NASDAQ: LNAI) showcased AI platform on CNBC for drug discovery, CEO talks scaling therapeutics.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, Lunai Bioworks, a biotech and biodefense company utilizing AI technology, was highlighted on CNBC's Business Minute on February 13, 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ as LNAI, is led by CEO David Weinstein. Weinstein discussed the utilization of their proprietary AI platform to expand therapeutic discovery efforts.

data.title: Ironstone Academy expands Goldendoodle training program with 2 new modules, enhancing online platform.
data.description: In Cuba City, Wisconsin on February 13, 2026, Ironstone Goldendoodles, a renowned canine breeding and education company, unveiled a major expansion plan for its online training platform, the Ironstone Academy. The Academy recently integrated two new comprehensive programs to enhance its offerings.

data.title: OpenMetal names Jamie Tischart new CTO to drive private cloud innovation. Virginia Beach, Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: Virginia Beach, VA - On February 13, 2026, OpenMetal revealed the appointment of Jamie Tischart as their new Chief Technology Officer. This decision comes at a crucial time as businesses are shifting from hyperscale cloud and proprietary platforms. Tischart's role will focus on enhancing operational maturity and driving the technology strategy of the company. The announcement signifies OpenMetal's dedication to staying at the forefront of technological advancements, ensuring they adapt to industry changes.
